description: A steward-approved pattern -> classification rule mined from repeated discrepancy resolutions (Konzept §17.3 learning path 1). NOT background ML — pattern-mining with EXPLICIT human confirmation, auditable, deactivatable (important for Pharma/Aerospace compliance). When a steward makes the same classification ~50 times, the system proposes a rule; the steward approves it explicitly; resolved discrepancies link back via RESOLVED_BY_RULE.

attributes.name: pattern
attributes.description: Match condition, e.g. { class: multi_source, source_a: bde, source_b: plc, abs_delta_lt: 5, has_worker_note: true }

attributes.name: status
attributes.description: proposed = awaiting steward approval; disabled = retired without deletion (audit-preserving)

attributes.name: hit_count
attributes.description: How often the rule auto-resolved a discrepancy
